creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #14)

Ah thanks, I had never seen asking for an exp-run using patches from two different bug reports.

If the exp run for bug #265994 is completed successfully we can indeed go faster.

I see the patch you submitted for this bug report does not cover gcc10. Is it because you do not need it or GCC_DEFAULT=11 made you forget about gcc10 being still around?
